signals.title: Israel Launches Broad Wave of Strikes in Tehran Amid US-Iran War Escalation
signals.impact_description: Fundamental reshaping of Middle East geopolitical order; potential for wider regional war; global energy supply disruption; alliance realignment
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Critical military escalation with direct strikes on capital city; unprecedented scale of Middle East conflict

signals.title: South Korea KOSPI Suffers Historic 12% Crash Amid Hormuz Strait Blockade
signals.impact_description: South Korea's economic vulnerability to energy disruptions exposed; potential cascade to semiconductor supply chains; systemic risk to export-dependent economies
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Record single-day crash exceeding 9/11 impact; existential energy dependency exposure

signals.title: Global Oil Prices Surge Toward $100 as Strait of Hormuz Traffic Halts
signals.impact_description: Global energy crisis if sustained; inflationary pressure across all sectors; aviation industry disruption; potential recession trigger
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Oil approaching psychological $100 barrier; 21,300 flights canceled; Hormuz transit halted

signals.title: France and Germany Deepen Nuclear Deterrence Cooperation in Historic Defense Shift
signals.impact_description: European strategic autonomy acceleration; NATO architecture transformation; nuclear deterrence recalibration; implications for transatlantic alliance
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Historic shift in European nuclear posture; first joint nuclear exercises between France and Germany

signals.title: US Universal Import Tariff May Rise to 15% This Week as Trade War Escalates
signals.impact_description: Global trade architecture disruption; supply chain reconfiguration; inflationary pressure; manufacturing reshoring acceleration
signals.tipping_point_evidence: SCOTUS ruling created legal vacuum; rapid escalation from 10% to potential 15%; ISM prices at multi-year highs

signals.title: Singapore Warns Global Instability Is Fueling Climate Risks, Designates 2026 Year of Climate Adaptation
signals.impact_description: Climate adaptation becoming urgent policy priority; insurance industry transformation; infrastructure investment reallocation; food and water security challenges
signals.tipping_point_evidence: 1.5C overshoot likely; consecutive record-breaking years; clean energy dominates 90%+ of new capacity

signals.title: Chinese AI Models Challenge Western Dominance: MiniMax M2.5 Rivals Claude Opus 4.6 at Fraction of Cost
signals.impact_description: AI geopolitical competition intensification; cost democratization of frontier AI; potential erosion of Western AI dominance; industry consolidation pressure
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Chinese models reaching parity at fraction of cost; industry paradigm shift from scale to usability

signals.title: Iraq Suffers Nationwide Blackout as Power Grid Collapses Amid Regional Conflict
signals.impact_description: Humanitarian crisis escalation; state fragility increase; regional destabilization; infrastructure interdependency exposure
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Complete infrastructure collapse in sovereign state; cascading humanitarian effects

signals.title: China Shows Few Signs of Directly Supplying Arms to Iran Despite Growing Pressure
signals.impact_description: China's geopolitical positioning in multipolar conflict; implications for Taiwan contingency planning; arms trade dynamics; great power competition
signals.tipping_point_evidence: China's strategic ambiguity on Iran arms; NPC session coinciding with regional crisis

signals.title: Eurozone Manufacturing PMI Hits 44-Month High as Germany Crosses Above 50 for First Time Since 2022
signals.impact_description: European industrial recovery signal; safe-haven asset surge indicating systemic risk perception; divergence between real economy recovery and financial market stress
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Manufacturing recovery crossing 50 threshold; gold at record highs signals risk aversion

signals.title: Korea-Singapore AI Alliance Launched with $300M Fund as President Lee Visits
signals.impact_description: AI governance standards development; semiconductor-AI convergence; bilateral technology alliances reshaping innovation landscape
signals.tipping_point_evidence: New bilateral AI framework with dedicated fund

signals.title: NVIDIA Partners with Coherent on Optics Technology for Next-Generation Data Center Architecture
signals.impact_description: Data center architecture evolution; AI compute scaling trajectory; semiconductor supply chain transformation; robotics integration acceleration
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Major infrastructure partnership addressing AI scaling bottleneck

signals.title: France, Germany and UK Issue Joint Statement Condemning Indiscriminate Iranian Attacks
signals.impact_description: European direct involvement in Middle East conflict; transatlantic security recalibration; civilian evacuation challenges; military base defense operations
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Joint European military response statement; potential direct military intervention

signals.title: Appeal Hearings Begin in Former South Korean President Yoon Suk Yeol's Obstruction Case
signals.impact_description: Constitutional governance precedent; presidential accountability; South Korean political stabilization; democratic institution resilience
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Legal proceedings following established judicial process

signals.title: Green Party Wins First By-Election in Gorton and Denton, Signaling UK Political Realignment
signals.impact_description: UK political party system evolution; Green politics mainstreaming; climate policy acceleration in British politics; multi-party system emergence
signals.tipping_point_evidence: First ever Green by-election win in UK history

signals.title: Japan Finance Minister Monitors Markets as Yen Trades Near 157.3 Amid Middle East Volatility
signals.impact_description: Asian currency instability; coordinated central bank response necessity; safe-haven asset reallocation; Asia-Pacific economic growth deceleration
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Yen at 157.3; Asian markets in coordinated decline; finance minister intervention signals

signals.title: MIT Protein-Based Drug Design Model Could Reduce Pharma R&D Costs by Billions
signals.impact_description: Pharmaceutical R&D paradigm transformation; drug discovery timeline compression; precision medicine advancement; biotechnology investment surge
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Novel computational approach to synthetic protein design

signals.title: EU 'Buy European' Plan Faces Internal Division as March Summit Approaches
signals.impact_description: EU industrial policy realignment; trade architecture evolution; economic sovereignty vs open trade tension; implications for transatlantic trade
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Internal EU division on trade policy approach

signals.title: Global Debt to Reach $29 Trillion in 2026 Bond Issuance, 17% Higher Than 2024
signals.impact_description: Fiscal sustainability concerns; sovereign debt crisis risk; interest rate trajectory implications; intergenerational fiscal burden
signals.tipping_point_evidence: 17% year-over-year increase in global borrowing; $29 trillion unprecedented level

signals.title: China-Japan Diplomatic Crisis Deepens as Chinese Embassy Issues Warning Against 'Bumpers'
signals.impact_description: East Asian security architecture stress; Japan-China economic decoupling risk; tourism industry diplomatic weaponization; Taiwan contingency readiness implications
signals.tipping_point_evidence: Diplomatic crisis deepening; tourism-security nexus tensions; Taiwan contingency framing
